P0_preregistered_interpretation.P0_approx_P1: If P0 separates approximately like P1, the preregistered reading is that price itself carries information: an evolutionary Spence/Zahavi handicap can separate without the knife.
P0_preregistered_interpretation.P0_fails_but_P1_works: If P0 fails while P1 works, the preregistered reading is that price alone is not carrying the channel; contingency of confiscation is load-bearing.
P0_preregistered_interpretation.expected_pattern: P0 fails while P1 works, because a defector can gain more from sheltering under a trusted declaration than it pays as a non-refundable tax.

anti_shylock_principles.fungibility: Stake is denominated in substrate resource/aid currency, not body, viability, type, or lineage identity.
anti_shylock_principles.mechanical_fail_closed_burn: Verified nonconformance mechanically burns outstanding stake and triggers containment; burned stake is destroyed and redistributed to nobody.
anti_shylock_principles.proportionality: Stake is a fraction of raw_aid, never an absolute fee; rich and poor zones face the same fraction.
anti_shylock_principles.survivability: Confiscation removes only escrowed stake. The non-escrowed fraction of raw_aid remains available to the zone.

arms.F1: free verified arm: wave-4 A2s logic under new seeds, no stake
arms.P0: trusted costly signal: non-refundable 0.25 declaration tax burned immediately; no escrow tranches, no verification, trusted softening
arms.P1-high: verified bonded arm: rolling escrow stake fraction 0.40
arms.P1-low: verified bonded arm: rolling escrow stake fraction 0.10

artifact_channel_registry.deflation: Burned P0 tax and forfeited P1 stake leave the world; no referee, neighbor, or zone receives the confiscated resource.
artifact_channel_registry.escrow_window: k = containment_duration = 5; rationale: reuse of a published horizon, not a new tuned constant

observable_extension.description: Public zone-level collateral balance; referee-side escrow/forfeit may read it as stake-state.

referee_side_verification_policy_and_sta.description: Conformance, C_full_artifacts policy, stake settlement, P0 tax burn, P1 return/burn, and containment read only Obs + declaration + public stake-state.

world_side_emission.description: Declaration emission is agent/world behavior; it may read declaration strategy fields and is not part of the referee leakage scan.
world_side_emission.initial_conditions: F1/P0/P1-low/P1-high start with declaration_propensity=1.0 and declaration_envelope_stiffness=0.50; both fields remain evolvable.

metadata.background_interpretation_not_verdict: If bonded channels fail, the ontology reading is that procedural legibility is constitutional, not attachable as a channel; this is metadata interpretation, not a decision verdict.
metadata.kill_FW3: If P1-low and P1-high both fail H-P2 L1 parity recovery and J-N7b H-P3 directional, bonded envelope fails simpliciter.
metadata.mode: prospective draft; not locked; no scientific run before author approval

outcome_branches.FAIL: Any required primary hypothesis fails; publish the vector as-is.
outcome_branches.PASS: H-P1, H-P2 L1, and H-P4 pass; H-P2 L2 and H-P5 are reported in the decision vector.

metadata.question: Does a proportional bonded declaration envelope make procedural declarations carry where the free envelope failed?
metadata.retention_interpretation: Retention is informative in FW-3 because bonded/taxed declarations have real resource cost: RETAINED means revealed net benefit; DECAYED means revealed net cost, not mere drift.
metadata.seed_policy_rationale_guard_9: Wave 5 J-N7 uses fresh 80-seed block 25000-25079, disjoint from prior 16000/17000/18000/19000/20000/21000/22000/23000/24000 blocks and from J-N7b 26000-26079.
metadata.trajectory_output_policy: Large per-step outputs are written as .json.gz from the first committed result.

threshold_change_rationale.H_P1_margin: 0.12 follows published tolerance practice for nonconformance separation.
threshold_change_rationale.H_P2_margin: 0.2 is one published adversarial_pressure grid step; L2 extension requires a one-step ceiling gain.
threshold_change_rationale.H_P4_tolerance: 0.10 is the preregistered concentration tolerance: same scale as directional specificity and large enough to avoid treating small concentration movement as capture.
threshold_change_rationale.H_P5_retention: 0.50/0.10 retain the wave-4 RETAINED/DECAYED classification thresholds, now made informative by real bonded/taxed cost.
threshold_change_rationale.arms: FW-3 compares free verified declarations, non-refundable trusted tax, and two verified bonded stake fractions against A0.
threshold_change_rationale.escrow_window: k = containment_duration = 5; rationale: reuse of a published horizon, not a new tuned constant
threshold_change_rationale.seeds: Wave 5 J-N7 owns fresh 80-seed block 25000-25079; J-N7b owns 26000-26079; prior gates used lower non-overlapping blocks.

H_P2_domain.L1_parity_recovery: best pressure_ceiling(P1-low, P1-high) >= pressure_ceiling(A0) in all measured worlds
H_P2_domain.L2_extension: best pressure_ceiling(P1-low, P1-high) >= pressure_ceiling(A0) + 0.2 in at least 2/3 worlds

H_P4_concentration_guard.metric: P1 capture_index and mean_declared_resource_concentration relative to A0

P0_preregistered_readings.P0_approx_P1: price itself carries information; knife not load-bearing
P0_preregistered_readings.P0_fails_but_P1_works: contingency of confiscation is load-bearing; price alone is empty

thresholds.kill_FW3: If P1-low and P1-high both fail H-P2 L1 parity recovery and J-N7b H-P3 directional, bonded envelope fails simpliciter.

mechanics.escrow_window_rationale: reuse of a published horizon, not a new tuned constant
